version_description: Exactly as Ed plays it live: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SPKBtZHuzKY.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Tuning: E-A-D-E-B-E

[ch]E[/ch] (0-7-6-0-0-0)
[ch]C#m7[/ch] (9-11-11-0-0-0)
[ch]Bsus4[/ch] (7-9-9-0-0-0)
[ch]Asus2[/ch] (5-7-7-0-0-0)


[Verse 1]

[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Loving can hurt, loving can hurt sometimes.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bsus4[/ch]                   [ch]Asus2[/ch] 
But it's the only thing that I know.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]C#m7[/ch]
When it gets hard, you know it can get hard sometimes,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bsus4[/ch]                              [ch]Asus2[/ch]
It is the only thing that makes us feel alive.[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]                       [ch]Asus2[/ch]
  We keep this love in a photograph.[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                             [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
  We made these memories for ourselves.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Where our eyes are never closing,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Our hearts are never broken,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]                          [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
And time's forever frozen, still.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]
So you can keep me[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Inside the pocket of your ripped jeans.[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Holding me close until our eyes meet.[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Asus2[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]
You won't ever be alone, wait for me to come home.[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Loving can heal, loving can mend your soul,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bsus4[/ch]                        [ch]Asus2[/ch]
And it's the only thing that I know, know.[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]E[/ch]                               [ch]C#m7[/ch]
I swear it will get easier, remember that with every piece of 'ya,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bsus4[/ch]                                 [ch]Asus2[/ch]
And it's the only thing we take with us when we die.[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]                       [ch]Asus2[/ch]
  We keep this love in a photograph.[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                             [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
  We made these memories for ourselves.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Where our eyes are never closing,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Our hearts are never broken,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]                          [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
And time's forever frozen, still.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]
So you can keep me[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Inside the pocket of your ripped jeans.[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Holding me close until our eyes meet.[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Asus2[/ch]
You won't ever be alone,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]
And if you hurt me,[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
That's okay baby, only words bleed.[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Inside these pages you just hold me,[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Asus2[/ch]
And I won't ever let you go.[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Wait for me to come home,[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Wait for me to come home,[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]E[/ch]
Wait for me to come home,[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Wait for me to come home.[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]
You can fit me[/tab]
[tab]                                           [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Inside the necklace you got when you were sixteen.[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Next to your heartbeat where I should be.[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Keep it deep within your soul.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]
And if you hurt me[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Well that's okay baby, only words bleed.[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Inside these pages you just hold me,[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Asus2[/ch]
And I won't ever let you go.[/tab]


[Outro]

[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]                          [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
When I'm away, I will remember how you kissed me[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Under the lamppost back on Sixth street,[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Hearing you whisper through the phone,[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]E[/ch]
Wait for me to come home.[/tab]
